ff5598b0ccc9.summary: This is a foreman-level role requiring crew leadership on commercial, industrial, and residential projects. Compensation includes a competitive hourly rate, bonus potential, health insurance, 401K, paid vacation, and a company vehicle or allowance. The listing is placed by Gpac, a national executive search/staffing firm recruiting on behalf of a local electrical contractor.

0e2335eef37c.summary: Role focuses on Building Management Systems (BMS), Building Automation Systems (BAS), Direct Digital Controls (DDC), and HVAC automation — a more specialized niche within electrical work. Aerotek is a staffing agency, so this would be a contract or temp-to-hire placement rather than direct employment. The salary figure from Adzuna appears to be a single point estimate around $44,860/year with no explicit hourly rate mentioned in the listing.

9a63499f7a22.summary: Project-based solar construction role (2-3 months) at a utility-scale/commercial solar site in Emerson, NE. Position includes GSA per diem rates. Work involves installing, assembling, testing, and maintaining PV solar electrical systems.

25784ec99e21.summary: Bianco Electric in Omaha, NE is hiring an Electrical Apprentice to work alongside journeyman electricians in a supportive learning environment. The role emphasizes hands-on training and career development in the electrical trade. The listing is entry-level and welcoming to motivated individuals looking to start their electrical career.
